pi_items.source: Verified NORAD IDs for AO-7 (7530), FO-29 (24278), and FuncUBE-1/AO-73 (39444) via web search and confirmed their presence in the task instructions.
Verified NORAD IDs for AO-27 (22825), SO-50 (27607), AO-85 (40967), and AO-95 (43770) via web search and confirmed their presence in the task instructions.
Task description strictly requires Latitude = 40.7484 N.
Task description strictly requires Longitude = 74.0060 W, which corresponds to -74.0060.
Task description strictly requires Altitude = 10 meters.
Confirmed the names and NORAD ID pairings (AO-7=7530, FO-29=24278, FuncUBE-1=39444, AO-27=22825, SO-50=27607, AO-85=40967, AO-95=43770) are accurate to real-world amateur satellites via web search.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env amateur_module_reorganization task by verifying the task acts on synthetically generated partial GPredict modules (Linear.mod and FM_Voice.mod) created in setup scripts. Confirmed via web search that the required satellites (AO-7, FO-29, FuncUBE-1, AO-27, SO-50, AO-85, AO-95) and their corresponding NORAD IDs (7530, 24278, 39444, 22825, 27607, 40967, 43770) accurately map to real-world amateur radio satellites and match the task description. Also verified the target ground station parameters explicitly match the task description and verifier constraints.
